project.title: Digital Well-Being and Screen Fatigue Prevention
project.description:
Digital Well-Being & Screen Fatigue Prevention is an interactive, self-paced e-learning course designed to help learners understand, recognize, and manage digital eye strain and screen fatigue in screen-intensive environments.
Through storytelling, guided reflection, hands-on activities, and scenario-based decision-making, learners explore why prolonged screen use affects visual comfort and focus—and how small, evidence-based habits can make a meaningful difference. The course emphasizes awareness, practical application, and behavior change rather than passive information consumption.
Built using Articulate Storyline 360, the course features interactive elements such as sliders, branching scenarios, timed activities, and visual simulations to create an engaging and learner-centered experience. Learners leave the course with increased awareness of their screen habits and actionable strategies to support healthier, more sustainable digital use.
